name: matconnect-for-wordpress
description: Build toolchain for MatConnect Gutenberg blocks

scripts.build: wp-scripts build blocks/schedule/edit.js blocks/pricing/edit.js blocks/lead-form/edit.js blocks/testimonials/edit.js blocks/faq/edit.js --output-path=blocks
scripts.start: wp-scripts start blocks/schedule/edit.js blocks/pricing/edit.js blocks/lead-form/edit.js blocks/testimonials/edit.js blocks/faq/edit.js --output-path=blocks
